title: template-manifest.json
description: Records the relationship between a project and the project-template it was bootstrapped from. Lives at the project root. Used by template-sync to classify assets as generic / flavor / project-local.

schema_version.description: Bumped when the manifest format changes incompatibly.

repo.description: GitHub repo of the template, e.g. 'samyakjhaveri/project-template'.

commit.description: SHA of the template commit at bootstrap time.

path.description: Local path to the template clone at bootstrap time. Used as a fallback when $TEMPLATE_PATH is unset.

flavors.description: Ordered list of flavors applied (init-project.sh + any add-flavor.sh calls).

project_name.description: The project's short name, used in promote-branch naming and seed-doc placeholders.

asset_overrides.description: Map of asset relpaths to layer overrides. Used when a project asset's layer differs from its origin (e.g., a generic-core skill that the user has localized and explicitly does NOT want promoted).
